title: malache mollis
intro: Malache mollis, also known as Malachite Money Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The Malachite Money Plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural remedy for digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into a tea or infusion, while the roots can be dried and used in traditional remedies.
